rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple consistency issues and provides detailed fixes, indicating a thorough end-to-end analysis.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits several claims against evidence, ensuring alignment and pointing out unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is flagged for some claims but not all recommendations, showing partial disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; identifies potential harms in original text.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, minor edits aren't, lacking full traceability.
